title: Wabash National India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Wabash National India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Wabash National India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Wabash National India:
Wabash National India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wabash National India!
